_comment: The Config·JSON 'sweep' value. trials = the swept grid (ONLY the dimensions that vary, string-valued); the constant base (epochs/batch/workers) lives in the Train Model node config and is merged in per trial (trial wins per key). dataset = the shared training channel. NOTE: the dataset MUST live in a conduit-* bucket — the SageMaker execution role (conduit-sagemaker-exec-*) only reads arn:aws:s3:::conduit-*; e.g. s3://conduit-staging-<account>/...
